transport_governance.name: Ministry, Leadership & Governance
transport_governance.description: Activities of the Federal Ministry of Transportation. Includes policy announcements, ministerial inspections, transport budgets, and regulatory frameworks governing the sector.

road_transport_highways.name: Road Transport & Highways
road_transport_highways.description: Condition and management of federal roads and highways. Covers potholes, road rehabilitation, FERMA (Federal Roads Maintenance Agency), and major expressways (Lagos-Ibadan, Abuja-Kano).

rail_transport.name: Rail Transport
rail_transport.description: Railway services and infrastructure. Includes NRC (Nigeria Railway Corporation), train schedules, ticket handling, Abuja-Kaduna train, Lagos-Ibadan rail, and Warri-Itakpe line.

aviation_airports.name: Aviation & Airports
aviation_airports.description: Air travel sector. Covers FAAN, NCAA, airport conditions (MMIA, Nnamdi Azikiwe), flight delays, airline operations (Air Peace, etc.), and aviation fuel scarcity.

maritime_ports.name: Maritime, Ports & Logistics
maritime_ports.description: Sea transport and ports authority. Includes NPA (Nigerian Ports Authority), NIMASA, Apapa Port, Tin Can Island, port congestion, customs clearance, and waterways.

transport_safety_accidents.name: Safety, Accidents & Emergencies
transport_safety_accidents.description: Transport safety and road crashes. Includes FRSC (Federal Road Safety Corps), road accidents, tanker explosions, train derailments, and air crashes/incidents.

infrastructure_projects_delivery.name: Infrastructure Projects & Delivery
infrastructure_projects_delivery.description: Major transport infrastructure projects. Covers completion of rail lines, new airport terminals, bridge construction, and project timelines.

urban_transport_fares.name: Urban Transport, Fares & Green Mobility
urban_transport_fares.description: Intra-city commuting and costs. Includes transport fares (T-fare), BRT buses, Okada/Keke bans, Danfo, CNG buses (Compressed Natural Gas), and electric vehicle initiatives.

transport_labour_unions.name: Public Sentiment, Labour & Media
transport_labour_unions.description: Transport unions and worker sentiment. Covers NURTW (National Union of Road Transport Workers), RTEAN, NARTO, transport strikes, and public complaints.

transport_crisis_signals.name: Early Warning & Crisis Signals
transport_crisis_signals.description: Security risks in transport. Includes kidnapping on highways, attacks on trains, robbery in traffic (one chance), and blockades of roads.
